SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Georges Home Improvement: Philly's Home Repair Experts

Georges Home Improvement Services started with a simple goal: provide reliable, high-quality handyman services to the Philadelphia community. We saw a need for skilled professionals who understood the unique challenges of maintaining Philly's diverse housing stock, from historic row homes to modern condos.

Our approach is built on clear communication, transparent pricing, and meticulous attention to detail. We treat every project, big or small, with the same level of care and dedication, ensuring your complete satisfaction. We believe in doing the job right the first time, every time.

We're proud to be a part of the Philadelphia community. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support local initiatives. Our commitment extends beyond just fixing homes; we're invested in making Philadelphia a better place for everyone.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Georges Home Improvement Services

Experienced Professionals

Our team comprises seasoned handymen with years of experience tackling diverse home repair challenges in Philadelphia.

Reliable and Punctual

We respect your time and always arrive on schedule, ready to get the job done efficiently and effectively.

Upfront Pricing

No surprises! We provide detailed and transparent estimates before starting any work, so you know exactly what to expect.

Satisfaction Guaranteed

We stand behind our work. If you're not completely satisfied, we'll make it right, no questions asked.

Ready to Get Started?

Contact Georges Home Improvement Services today for a free estimate. Let us handle your home repair needs with expertise and care.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Georges Home Improvement Services did an excellent job repairing a large hole in my living room wall. The repair was seamless, and you can't even tell there was ever any damage. They were professional, efficient, and very reasonably priced. Highly recommend!

Maria S. Drywall Repair
“

I had a leaky faucet that was driving me crazy. Georges Home Improvement Services came out quickly and fixed it without any problems. The plumber was friendly and knowledgeable. I was happy with the service.

David B. Plumbing Repair
“

Georges Home Improvement Services upgraded my electrical panel and installed new outlets in my kitchen. The electrician was very professional and took the time to explain everything to me. I feel much safer knowing my electrical system is up to code.

Jessica L. Electrical Services
“

Georges Home Improvement Services painted the exterior of my row home in Fishtown. They did a fantastic job, and the house looks brand new. The painters were meticulous and paid attention to every detail. I couldn't be happier with the results.

Michael K. Painting Services
“

Georges Home Improvement Services built a custom bookshelf for my home office. The bookshelf is beautiful and exactly what I wanted. The carpenter was skilled and easy to work with. My only complaint is that the project took a little longer than expected.

Emily R. Carpentry Services
“

After a particularly bad Nor'easter, my gutters were overflowing. Georges Home Improvement Services came out and cleaned them thoroughly, and also repaired a section that had come loose. They saved me from potential water damage. Great service!

Peter T. Gutter Cleaning & Repair

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long will the drywall repair take?
The duration of the repair depends on the extent of the damage. Small holes can often be repaired in a few hours, while larger repairs may take a day or two. We'll provide a more accurate timeline during the initial assessment.
Will the repair be noticeable?
We take great care to blend the repaired area seamlessly with the existing wall. Our skilled technicians are experts at matching textures and finishes, ensuring a virtually invisible repair.
Do you offer painting services after the drywall repair?
Yes, we offer complete painting services to match the existing color and texture of your walls. We use high-quality paints for a durable and long-lasting finish.
